name: Common Standards for Cybersecurity Measures for Government Agencies and Related Agencies
owner: Cybersecurity Strategic Headquarters / National Cybersecurity Office, Japan
description: FY2025 (Reiwa 7) edition, revised June 27, 2025. Government-agency cybersecurity baseline issued under Article 26(1) of the Basic Act on Cybersecurity: Chapter 1 General Provisions plus a Basic Framework covering organizational structure, asset/ledger management, risk assessment, incident response systems, and agency-specific standards, including cloud (ISMAP-aligned) controls.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/cyber.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Issued directly by a national government ministry/agency as an official notification/circular -- plausibly excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13(2) ("notifications, instructions, circulars, and other documents similar thereto issued by national or local government organs"), but this is a less clear-cut case than primary legislation (Art. 13(1)) and has not been legally verified. Treat as moderate-confidence permitted, not certain.

current_extraction.notes: Full English text acquired. PDF was GPKI-signed/encrypted (decrypted with qpdf --decrypt) -- an earlier session pass via WebFetch could not extract text from this same PDF; local pdftotext -layout succeeded once decrypted.

scope.notes: Full text acquired; not yet decomposed into structured per-control JSON/CSV.
